title: Consumer decision-making
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Consumer — stages of purchase decision and high vs low involvement buying.
learningObjectives: Distinguish high and low involvement purchases.
Explain information search and evaluation of alternatives.
Evaluate rational vs emotional decision models.

simpleExplanation.title: How buying decisions happen
simpleExplanation.summary: Consumers move from recognising a need through search and comparison to purchase and post-purchase evaluation — more steps for big decisions.

sections.content: **Consumer decision-making** (2.3.1) opens 2.3. Know **five stages** and **involvement level**.
